hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/apps/web/package.json" ] && ! curl -s http://localhost:5173 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"additionalContext": "Dev server is not running. Start it with: bash tools/scripts/dev-server.sh"}'; fi
[ "$(git branch --show-current)" != "main" ] || echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Cannot edit files on main. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feat/<slug>"}'

fp=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$fp" ] && exit 0; case "$fp" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.svelte|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css) npx @biomejs/biome check --write "$fp" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac

fp=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$fp" ] && exit 0; case "$fp" in *.svelte|*.ts|*.js|*.css) sleep 2; if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.dev-logs/vite-dev.log" ]; then ERRORS=$(tail -30 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.dev-logs/vite-dev.log" | grep -i 'error\|500\|SyntaxError\|TypeError\|Cannot find' | tail -5); if [ -n "$ERRORS" ]; then echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"Dev server errors after edit:\n$ERRORS\"}"; fi; fi;; esac
